testimonial.title: OUR CLIENTS' FEEDBACK
testimonial.desc: Companies and individuals who have worked with us highly appreciate the quality of our work and our professionalism.

client1.name: Qayumov Dilshod
client1.text: The product is very high quality and fully meets the requirements of the global market.

client2.name: Hasanov Zafar

client3.name: Keldiyorov Samandar

about.title: About Us
about.description: NeftGasProm is a local company registered in Tashkent, specializing in the production of waterproofing materials. We produce bitumen and bitumen-polymer based products, providing reliable protection of facilities from moisture and water. Thanks to modern technologies and strict quality control, we achieve stable results.

product1.name: MASTIC №1 BITUMEN
product1.desc: Professional waterproofing mastic. Available in 9 kg buckets. 100% protection against moisture and water.

product2.name: POLYMER-BITUMEN MASTIC
product2.desc: High elasticity and heat resistance. Ideal for construction and roofing works.

product3.name: WATERPROOF COATING
product3.desc: Waterproof coating. Specially designed for concrete and metal surfaces.

product4.name: BITUMEN PRIMER
product4.desc: Surface preparation primer. Necessary for good adhesion of products.
